title: KirbCraft
description: Combines Tfc+ with NTM space along with performance boosts
body:
# A unique take on the "Terrafirmagreg" concept.

Heavily inspired by Dr. Stone, factorio, & GTNH, in Kirbcraft you start out stranded on an alien planet with nothing with the goal of escaping to space.

---

I designed this pack to focus less on microcrafting and tedium, and more on solving unique automation challanges, because I personally find that to be the most fun part of technology mods.

To achieve this, this pack includes NTM-Space, as well as TerraFirmaCraft+, in addition to supporting optimization mods. Kirbcraft is designed to minimize the grind and maximize the fun that comes from working with tech mods that naturally compliment eachother.

---

Additions:
- Seasons
- Thirst Mechanics
- Radiation
- New ore generation
- Heavy optimization (Thanks to LGWIFY & FalseTweaks etc)
- Beautiful Aesthetics 
- Structures

Technology:
- Custom Rockets
- Interstellar industry
- Chemical Processing Lines
- Ore refinement
- Steam age Technology
- Oil processing

Attribution:
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/vanilla-themed-tfc
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terrafirmacraftneiplugin
